items.name: OAG Schedules
items.description: Commercial schedule data received from OAG feeds.

items.name: Cirium Schedules
items.description: Commercial schedule data received from Cirium schedules.

items.name: Airline Direct
items.description: Schedule updates received directly from an operating airline.

items.name: Manual Upload
items.description: Schedule files uploaded manually by operations users.

items.name: Secure FTP
items.description: Automated schedule file delivery over SFTP.

items.name: Email Inbox
items.description: Schedule messages received by mailbox ingestion.

items.name: Message Queue
items.description: Schedule messages delivered through enterprise messaging.

items.name: REST API
items.description: Schedule data submitted through integration APIs.

items.name: Received
items.description: File received and waiting for validation.

items.name: Validated
items.description: File passed structural and business validation.

items.name: Processing
items.description: File is being parsed and persisted.

items.name: Loaded
items.description: Schedule data loaded successfully.

items.name: Partially Loaded
items.description: File loaded with validation or persistence exceptions.

items.name: Rejected
items.description: File rejected because mandatory validation failed.

items.name: Standard Schedules Information Manual
items.description: IATA SSIM seasonal schedule data.

items.name: Standard Schedule Message
items.description: Incremental schedule change message.

items.name: Ad-hoc Schedule Message
items.description: Operational ad-hoc schedule change message.

items.name: Urgent
items.description: Operationally critical schedule change.

items.name: High
items.description: High priority schedule update.

items.name: Normal
items.description: Standard processing priority.

items.name: Low
items.description: Non-urgent schedule update.

items.name: Seasonal Schedule
items.description: Full seasonal SSIM schedule load.

items.name: Ad-hoc Change
items.description: Single operational schedule change.

items.name: Cancellation
items.description: Cancellation or suspension schedule update.

items.name: Retiming
items.description: Departure or arrival time change.

items.name: Operational Suffix A
items.description: Common suffix for duplicated flight numbers or variants.

items.name: Operational Suffix B
items.description: Secondary suffix for duplicated flight numbers or variants.

items.name: Operational Suffix D
items.description: Suffix used for duplicate or extra operation variants.
